body:
Auto-triage detected a critical smoke failure.

**triage.json (excerpt)**:

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "inferredTags": [
    "ConnectionRefused",
    "Static1420NotHttp"
  ],
  "severity": "critical",
  "internalErrors": [
    "DISABLE_CDP=1, skipping CDP discovery",
    "GOTO_ATTEMPT_FAILED: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://tauri.localhost/\nCall log:\n\^[[2m  - navigating to \"http://tauri.localhost/\", waiting until \"domcontentloaded\"\^[[22m\n",
    "GOTO_ATTEMPT_FAILED: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://tauri.localhost/\nCall log:\n\^[[2m  - navigating to \"http://tauri.localhost/\", waiting until \"domcontentloaded\"\^[[22m\n",
    "nav-failure-content failed: Error: page.content: Unable to retrieve content because the page is navigating and changing the content.",
    "gotoWithRetry initial: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://tauri.localhost/\nCall log:\n\^[[2m  - navigating to \"http://tauri.localhost/\", waiting until \"domcontentloaded\"\^[[22m\n",
    "INJECT_NOTE_ADD_FAILED: page.addStyleTag: Event",
    "pre-capture repaint attempt failed: page.evaluate: Execution context was destroyed, most likely because of a navigation.",
    "pre-capture repaint: not applied after retries",
    "waitForSelector [data-ux-ping]: page.waitForSelector: Timeout 8000ms exceeded.\nCall log:\n\^[[2m  - waiting for locator('[data-ux-ping=\"ok\"]') to be visible\^[[22m\n\n    at D:\\GitHub\\URMS\\Tests\\playwright\\smoke.cjs:309:24",
    "waitForEvent(console [ux-ping-ok]): page.waitForEvent: Timeout 8000ms exceeded while waiting for event \"console\"\n=========================== logs ===========================\nwaiting for event \"console\"\n============================================================\n    at D:\\GitHub\\URMS\\Tests\\playwright\\smoke.cjs:312:24"
  ]
}
```

comments.body: この Issue は triage 自動化の検証用に生成されたテスト Issue です。CI 自動診断・Issue 自動生成の動作確認は成功しました。

title: CI auto-triage: critical failure detected
